summary: Blur and focus text effect card component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/title-blur-focus/src/TitleBlurFocus.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TitleBlurFocus` and `titleBlurFocusDefaultProps`, then register the `TitleBlurFocus` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Title Blur Focus Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/title-blur-focus to my project. Preserve the exported TitleBlurFocusProps API and register the TitleBlurFocus composition with the default props.
